name: Country Cobb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 head iceberg lettuce, cut into bite-size pieces
20 ounces cooked boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange lettuce on a large serving platter.
2. Place cooked chicken in the center of the lettuce.
3. Place bacon bits in a row on one side of the chicken.
4. Place tomato in a row beside the bacon bits and avocado in a row beside them.
5. Place eggs, green onions, and blue cheese in rows on the other side of the chicken.
6. Serve immediately with salad dressing.
Serves: 4 to 6.
